tweet_text: 🚨 HUGE NEWS: Max Dowman, at just 16, becomes the youngest scorer in Premier League history as Arsenal secures a 2-0 victory over Everton, extending their lead to 10 points at the top! 🔥⚽️ #PremierLeague #Arsenal
article_title: Record-breaker Dowman scores late as Arsenal beat Everton

tweet_text: 🚨 Anthony Gordon's goal secures Newcastle a rare away win at Chelsea, with a final score of 1-0! This victory marks their first win at Stamford Bridge since 2012. #NUFC #CFC
article_title: Gordon goal gives Newcastle rare win at Chelsea

tweet_text: 🚨 HUGE NEWS: Arsenal secures a late 1-0 victory against Everton, boosting their title hopes! Viktor Gyökeres scored the crucial goal at the Emirates Stadium. ⚽️🏆 #PremierLeague #Arsenal
article_title: Max Dowman breaks record as Arsenal boost title push with late win against Everton

tweet_text: 🚨 West Ham hold Manchester City to a 1-1 draw, as ex-Arsenal star Konstantinos Mavropanos helps dent City's title hopes! Gunners gain crucial ground in the race. ⚽️🔴 #PremierLeague #TitleRace
article_title: West Ham dent Man City's title hopes as ex-Arsenal star does Gunners huge favour
